system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled тАФ proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process тАФ Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` тАФ schema.name.
- `body` тАФ T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` тАФ { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` тАФ map ten MSSQL тЖТ ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability тЖТ B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D тАФ dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.bg_thongke_banhang1","body":"


CREATE PROC [dbo].[bg_THONGKE_BANHANG1]
(
	@tungay date,
	@denngay date,
	@makh nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN
	select  f.loaigo,c.tenkh,a.id_chitiet as 'makienDQH', a.sokien,a.dayy,a.rong,a.dai,a.sothanh,a.sokhoi,a.usd_m3,a.thanhtien,a.ghichu,
		(ISNULL(b.tongtienthanhtoan,0) - ISNULL(b.tongtiendathanhtoan,0)) AS 'congno'
		,g.tenncc,d.ngaynhap,d.ngayxuatkho, d.malo_nguyenlieu, fsc.fsc_name
		from bg_donhang_chitiet a
		join bg_donhang b on a.sophieu = b.sophieu
		join bg_khachhang c on b.makh = c.makh
		join bg_xuatnhapgo d on a.id_chitiet = d.id
		join bg_xuatnhapgo f on a.id_chitiet = f.id
		left join bg_nhacc g on d.mancc = g.mancc
		left join tr_tinhtrang_fsc fsc on d.fsc_id = fsc.fsc_id
		where cast(d.ngayxuatkho as date) between @tungay and @denngay   AND b.active = 1 and a.active = 1
		and b.makh = @makh
END


","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.bg_donhang","dbo.bg_donhang_chitiet","dbo.bg_khachhang","dbo.bg_nhacc","dbo.bg_xuatnhapgo","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
